creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
If you have a look on lsi's site:

http://www.lsi.com/support/Pages/download-results.aspx?keyword=3dm

You'll see there has been a new release, v2.00.11.022.

I understand if you don't want to maintain it any more though.

PS: I did not notice it being unfetchable because I already have the distfiles.
